name: @polyshield/groth16-pipeline
description: Circom 2.1.6 + snarkjs Groth16 build pipeline: compile circuits, run trusted setup, generate IVerifier-adapter Solidity verifiers, copy wasm/zkey to the frontend, and regenerate RealVerifier test fixtures.

scripts.all: pnpm compile:circuits && pnpm setup:circuits && pnpm generate:verifiers && pnpm copy:artifacts && pnpm generate:test-proofs
